---
title: "Assignments"
date: last-modified
date-format: medium
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### List of Assignments

-   [Assignment 1: QGIS fundamentals (due Wednesday, Feb 05 before class)](./assignments/assignment1.html)

-   [Assignment 2: Working with spatial data (due thursday, Feb 26 before class)](./assignments/assignment2.qmd)

-   [Assignment 3: Applied Autocorrelation/Clustering ](./assignments/assignment3.qmd)

-   [Assignment 4: Spatial Regression ](./assignments/assignment4.qmd)

------------------------------------------------------------------------
